caption: A group of people wearing blue hairnets, red aprons, and pink gloves collaboratively prepare kimchi on a large table, showcasing the communal tradition of Kimjang.

In this image, a person wearing black gloves is holding a piece of napa cabbage covered in red chili paste, surrounded by a bowl filled with similar seasoned cabbage, showcasing the traditional Korean communal practice of Kimjang.
A group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok wave South Korean flags in front of a brick building, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.

The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional Korean attire, including white hanbok, standing in front of the Taegeukgi, symbolizing the Korean independence movement with a mix of formal and traditional clothing.

The image depicts a person wearing a vibrant red Jeontonghonrye, a traditional Korean wedding hanbok adorned with intricate floral patterns, standing indoors near an open door that reveals a serene outdoor setting.
In this image, a couple dressed in vibrant hanbok is seated before a ritual table adorned with traditional items, symbolizing a Korean traditional wedding ceremony known as Jeontonghonrye.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) setup, featuring a neatly arranged ritual table adorned with various foods in vibrant red and orange hues, set against a backdrop of calligraphy panels.

In this image, a family is performing an ancestral rite (Jesa) in a Korean home, characterized by a ritual table adorned with neatly arranged food offerings and family members bowing deeply in respect, dressed in traditional hanbok.

A group of individuals dressed in formal attire is standing in a line, facing forward, in a serene outdoor setting with trees and a statue in the background, likely participating in a Seongmyo ceremony.

In this image, a group of men dressed in formal black suits and ties are gathered at a Korean grave-tending rite (Seongmyo), bowing respectfully in front of a grave marked by a stone marker, with a small South Korean flag and offerings of food placed nearby on the grass.
The image shows a Cheomseongdae observatory illuminated with a pinkish hue, featuring a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, standing prominently in an open field at night.
The image shows Cheomseongdae, a Korean stone observatory, featuring a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, situated in an open field under a clear sky.

The image showcases the majestic Gyeongbokgung Palace at night, illuminated against a deep blue sky, featuring traditional wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and a raised stone platform, embodying the essence of Korean royal architecture.

The image showcases the Gyeongbokgung Palace, featuring traditional Korean architecture with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and a spacious stone-paved courtyard leading to the main pavilion.

The image showcases the serene Cheonggyecheon, an urban stream in Seoul, with its clear water flowing over rocks, surrounded by autumn-colored trees and modern buildings in the background, creating a harmonious blend of nature and city life.
The image depicts a statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin, a Korean naval hero, standing tall on a pedestal amidst a modern urban setting with fountains and potted trees lining the pathway.

In the image, two individuals are performing a Jeol, a traditional Korean formal deep bow, in front of an altar adorned with flowers and a framed portrait, wearing black attire and kneeling with their hands on the floor.

In this image, two children dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing a Jeol and Sebae, kneeling and bowing deeply with their hands on the floor, while an older couple watches attentively from a low seating area.

In the image, a family is dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, engaging in a Jeol and Sebae ritual where one person kneels and bows deeply with hands on the floor, symbolizing respect and familial bonds.

The image shows a group of people standing in front of a statue of Sejongdaewang, the King Sejong the Great, wearing traditional Joseon robes and a winged crown, with a large golden globe at their feet.
The image shows a statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, seated in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, illuminated against a backdrop of modern buildings and Korean flags at dusk.
A person is flying a colorful rainbow kite in a park, with the Yeon-nalligi style kite soaring high against a clear sky.
A person is flying a colorful kite in a park, with trees and a clear sky in the background, embodying the essence of Yeon-nalligi, the traditional Korean kite-flying activity.
A group of people is seated on the floor around a colorful Yutnori game board featuring vibrant floral patterns, engaging in the traditional Korean game.
Two children dressed in colorful hanbok are sitting on the floor, playing a traditional Korean game called Yutnori, with wooden sticks mid-air above them and a game board laid out before them.

A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing the Ganggangsullae dance in a large circle formation on a wooden platform, with a bridge and scenic water backdrop under a clear blue sky.

A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, featuring vibrant red and blue colors, perform a circular Ganggangsullae dance on a stage under a full moon, creating a harmonious and elegant visual arrangement.

The image depicts a performer in traditional Korean Talchum attire, featuring a vibrant yellow top with a purple sash and a blue skirt, complemented by a white mask with red accents, standing on a sandy surface with musical instruments and spectators in the background.
The image displays a vibrant collection of Talchum masks, each with distinct colors, patterns, and exaggerated facial features, arranged in a grid-like display to showcase their artistic diversity.
The image shows a bowl of ramyeon, featuring yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim, with a blurred side dish in the background.
The image shows a pot of ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth, accompanied by a container of kimchi on a white surface.

The image shows a box of gimbap, featuring cylindrical rolls of rice with colorful fillings such as cucumber, carrots, and sesame seeds, all wrapped in dark-green seaweed and sliced into round pieces.
The image shows a plate of wanja-jeon, Korean pan-fried meatballs, with small round golden-brown patties coated in a yellow batter, arranged neatly on a white paper-lined plate.
The image showcases a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, arranged neatly in a box, featuring pastel-colored squares with pressed floral patterns and small decorative pieces.

The image displays a box of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring rectangular pieces in various pastel colors, each adorned with pressed floral or geometric patterns, arranged neatly in rows.

The image showcases a bowl of Yaksik, a traditional Korean sweet rice dish, featuring a glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice with chestnuts, jujubes, and pine nuts, arranged on a checkered cloth atop a green bamboo mat.
The image displays a plate of yakgwa, small, flower-shaped or round pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, artfully arranged on a white plate with green leaves and yellow flowers as garnish.
The image showcases a traditional Korean dish, Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, arranged on a large, round, metal cooking pan over a heat source.

The image showcases a bowl of tteokguk, a traditional Korean New Year dish, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili, and other colorful toppings.

The image showcases a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.

The image showcases a plate of Japchae, featuring translucent brown glass noodles mixed with vibrant green spinach, orange carrots, and white onions, all garnished with sesame seeds, creating a visually appealing and appetizing dish.

The image showcases a traditional Korean pavilion with vibrant red pillars and intricate roof designs, set against a backdrop of clear blue skies and autumn foliage, embodying the essence of a Namhansanseong fortress.

The image showcases a serene view of Haenggung, featuring traditional Korean architecture with curved tiled roofs and vibrant dancheong-painted eaves, arranged symmetrically around lush green courtyards.

The image showcases the Paldalmun Gate, a traditional Korean gate of the Hwaseong Fortress, featuring an arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion, flanked by curved fortress walls, and adorned with red flags.

The image showcases the EXPO Hanbit Tower, a striking white observation tower with a disc-shaped deck and a pointed spire, set against a backdrop of lush green hills under an overcast sky, framed by the architectural lines of a modern bridge.
The image depicts a group of soldiers in military uniforms gathered around a truck in a rural setting, with green hills and trees in the background, suggesting a scene from the Korean War era.
The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, suggesting a post-war scene, possibly referencing the Korean War era.

The image depicts a traditional Korean village scene with thatched-roof houses, people gathered near a stone wall, and a serene body of water in the foreground, set against a backdrop of rolling hills under a clear blue sky.

A family is enjoying a sunny day outdoors, playing Jegichagi, a traditional Korean game where they kick a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock into the air with their feet, surrounded by blooming pink blossoms and greenery.
A child dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a pink vest and gray pants, is playfully kicking a small blue shuttlecock in mid-air, showcasing the dynamic motion of the jegichagi game.
